query: SELECT c.id, c.razaoSocial, c.cnpj, cc.id as caseId, cc.fase, cc.status, cc.contratoAssinadoEm FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN credit_cases cc ON cc.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY c.id LIMIT 10
